patch:
--- a/alu_8bit.v
+++ b/alu_8bit.v
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 module simple_alu(
   input [7:0] operand_a, operand_b,
   input [2:0] opcode,
   output reg [15:0] result
 );
-  always @(operand_a or opcode)
+  always @(operand_a or operand_b or opcode)
   begin
     case(opcode)
       3'b000: result = operand_a + operand_b;
